General.name: advertiser_id
General.description: The advertiser identifier from Display & Video 360.

General.name: insertion_order_id
General.description: The insertion order identifier from Display & Video 360.

General.name: line_item_id
General.description: The line item identifier from Display & Video 360.

General.name: date
General.description: The date the impression was made. Format: yyyymmdd

Date/Time.name: day_of_week
Date/Time.description: The numerical code for the day of the week the impression was made. 0 for Sunday, 1 for Monday, 2 for Tuesday, 3 for Wednesday, 4 for Thursday, 5 for Friday, 6 for Saturday

Date/Time.name: hour_of_day
Date/Time.description: The hour the impression was made using the browser's local time zone in the 24-hour format. Valid inputs: 0 - 23

Date/Time.name: utc_date
Date/Time.description: The date the impression was made using coordinated universal time (UTC). Format: yyyymmdd

Date/Time.name: utc_hour_of_day
Date/Time.description: The hour the impression was made using coordinated universal time (UTC) in 24-hour format. Valid inputs: 0 - 23

Creative (General).name: ad_type
Creative (General).description: The numerical code representing the ad format: 0 for display, 1 for video, 2 for audio

Creative (General).name: creative_height
Creative (General).description: Creative height in pixels. Note: For display creatives only.

Creative (General).name: creative_id
Creative (General).description: The creative ID as it appears in Display & Video 360.

Creative (General).name: creative_width
Creative (General).description: Creative width in pixels. Note: For display creatives only.

Computer System.name: browser_reportable_id
Computer System.description: The browser identifier. Note: browser_id was migrated to browser_reportable_id.

Computer System.name: browser_timezone_offset_minutes
Computer System.description: The difference in minutes between the active time zone on the browser and GMT-12.

Computer System.name: device_type
Computer System.description: The numerical code representing the device type: 0 for desktop, 1 for unknown, 2 for smart phone, 3 for tablet, 4 for smart TV, 5 for connected TV, 6 for set top box, 7 for connected device

Computer System.name: environment
Computer System.description: The numerical code representing the serving environment for your ad. 10 for web optimized for device, 11 for web not optimized for device, 12 for app

Computer System.name: isp_reportable_isp
Computer System.description: The internet service provider (ISP) identifier. Note: isp_id was migrated to isp_reportable_isp.

Computer System.name: mobile_make_reportable_id
Computer System.description: The mobile make identifier. Note: mobile_make_id was migrated to mobile_make_reportable_id.

Computer System.name: mobile_model_reportable_id
Computer System.description: The mobile model identifier. Note: mobile_model_id was migrated to mobile_model_reportable_id.

Computer System.name: net_speed
Computer System.description: The numerical code representing the network speed detected when the impression was made.

Computer System.name: operating_system_reportable_id
Computer System.description: The operating system identifier. Note: operating_system_id was migrated to operating_system_reportable_id.

Serving (General).name: ad_position
Serving (General).description: The numerical code representing the ad placement position: 0 for unknown position, 1 for above the fold, 2 for below the fold

Serving (General).name: channels
Serving (General).description: The channel identifier from Display & Video 360.

Serving (General).name: domain
Serving (General).description: The root domain name which consists of the domain name and the top-level domain.

Active View.name: active_view_measurable
Active View.description: Returns 1 for true if the impression was measurable by Active View when your ad was served.

Active View.name: active_view_viewed
Active View.description: Returns 1 for true once Active View detects that your ad has been viewed.

Event.name: click
Event.description: Returns 1 for true if the ad was clicked.

Event.name: time_on_screen_seconds
Event.description: The time the ad was on screen in seconds.

Video.name: audible
Video.description: Supported for real-time bidding (RTB) videos only. Returns 1 for true if the video’s sound was ON when viewed.

Video.name: completed_in_view_audible
Video.description: Supported for real-time bidding (RTB) videos only. Returns 1 for true if the video had the sound ON when viewed.

Video.name: video_completed
Video.description: Only applies to video ad types. Returns 1 for true if the video was completed.

Video.name: video_player_height_start
Video.description: The video player height at first frame in pixels.

Video.name: video_player_size
Video.description: The numerical code representing the target video inventory based on the video player size: 0 for unknown, 1 for small, 2 for large, 3 for high definition (HD)

Video.name: video_player_width_start
Video.description: The video player width at first frame in pixels.

Video.name: video_resized
Video.description: Returns 1 for true if the video player was resized during playback.

Video.name: viewable_on_complete
Video.description: Supported for real-time bidding (RTB) videos only. Returns 1 for true if the video was viewed on completion.

Video.name: video_content_duration_bucket
Video.description: The numerical code that represents the video's bucket.

Video.name: video_genre_ids
Video.description: Represents a list of video genre IDs for targeting ads based on related groups of audio and video inventory.

Video.name: video_livestream
Video.description: Returns true if the video is a livestream.

Conversions.name: total_conversion_count
Conversions.description: The total number of conversion events for ID pair. Arguments: Floodlight Activity ID, Attribution Model ID.

Conversions.name: total_conversion_value
Conversions.description: Takes the revenue value from activities tracked by Floodlight Sales tags. Arguments: Floodlight Activity ID, Attribution Model ID.

Conversions.name: total_conversion_quantity
Conversions.description: The total quantity of conversions attributed to the given ID pair. Arguments: Floodlight Activity ID, Attribution Model ID.

Conversions.name: conversion_custom_variable
Conversions.description: The string value of the custom variable for the latest attributed conversion for the impression. Arguments: Floodlight Activity ID, Attribution Model ID, Custom Variable Index.

Conversions.name: conversion_variable_num
Conversions.description: Gets the latest conversion with positive credit to get the “num” Floodlight variable if it exists. Arguments: Floodlight Activity ID, Attribution Model ID.

Conversions.name: conversion_variable_ord
Conversions.description: Gets the latest conversion with positive credit to get the “ord” Floodlight variable if it exists. Arguments: Floodlight Activity ID, Attribution Model ID.

Google Analytics.name: has_ga4_conversions
Google Analytics.description: Returns true if a given impression has at least one conversion with a property ID and conversion event attributed. Arguments: property_id, conversion_event_name.

Google Analytics.name: ga4_conversions_count
Google Analytics.description: Returns the number of conversions with a property ID and conversion event attributed to the given impression. Arguments: property_id, conversion_event_name.

Google Analytics.name: ga4_conversions_max_value
Google Analytics.description: Returns the highest value assigned to a conversion with a property ID and conversion event attributed to the given impression. Arguments: property_id, conversion_event_name.

Google Analytics.name: ga4_conversions_max_value_usd
Google Analytics.description: Note: For Google Analytics accounts using USD currency. Returns the highest value assigned to a conversion with a property ID and conversion ID attributed to the given impression. Arguments: property_id, conversion_event_name.

Google Analytics.name: ga4_conversions_total_value
Google Analytics.description: Returns the sum of the weight values assigned to conversions with a property ID and conversion event attributed to the given impression. Arguments: GA4 property ID, conversion_event_name.

Google Analytics.name: ga4_conversions_total_value_usd
Google Analytics.description: Note: For Google Analytics accounts using USD currency. Returns the sum of the weight values assigned to conversions with a property ID and conversion event attributed to the given impression. Arguments: property_id, conversion_event_name.

Functions.name: first_match_aggregate
Functions.description: Returns the weight value assigned to the first criteria in the array that returns true.

Functions.name: max_aggregate
Functions.description: Returns the highest weight value assigned to criteria that returns true.

Functions.name: sum_aggregate
Functions.description: Returns the sum of all values assigned to all criteria that return true.

Functions.name: bool
Functions.description: Returns a boolean value: true or false.

Functions.name: float
Functions.description: Converts a number or a string data type: Returns a floating point.

Functions.name: int
Functions.description: Converts a number or a string data type and returns an integer.

Functions.name: str
Functions.description: Converts a data type and returns a string.

Functions.name: log
Functions.description: With one argument: Returns the natural logarithm of x (to base e). With two arguments: Returns the logarithm of x to the given base.

Video Genre Mappings.1049: /Arts & Entertainment/TV & Video/TV Shows & Programs/TV Reality Shows
